title: 90 Pack Colourful Party Tableware Set - 30 x 7 Paper Plates, 30 Paper Cups, 30 Napkins, Multicoloured Rainbow Party Plates Cups and Napkins for Birthday Holiday Events
features: ✨【What You Will Get】A complete 90-piece rainbow tableware set – 30 x 7-inch birthday plates, 30 x paper cups, and 30 x cocktail napkins. Covering 6 vibrant hues (red, orange, yellow, green, blue, purple) with 5 pieces per color, this ready-to-use combo meets all your party serving needs, no extra purchases required.​

🎉【High Quality & Safe Material】Crafted from thick, durable food-grade paper, our rainbow plates, cups and napkins are BPA-free and non-toxic. They resist deformation and breakage, ensuring safe use for kids and adults alike – reliable even for holding snacks, drinks or small meals.​

🏆【Eye-Catching Rainbow Design】Featuring 6 bright, cheerful rainbow colors (red, yellow, blue, light green, pink, orange), this tableware set instantly elevates your party vibe. It will wow your little guests and impress adult attendees, helping create joyful, memorable moments for everyone.​

🌟【Hassle-Free Time Saving】Skip the tedious post-party dishwashing! Just collect all tableware after use and dispose of it easily. This saves you precious time to relax and enjoy more quality moments with friends and family, making your rainbow-themed party stress-free.​

🎊【Wide Applications for All Occasions】Perfect for UK households: ideal for kids’ birthday bashes, garden picnics, backyard BBQs, baby showers, graduation parties, wedding receptions, and anniversary gatherings. Suitable for both indoor events (like living room get-togethers) and outdoor use (park trips, patio parties).
